title: space's requeue
description: A mod that assists with requeueing on Hypixel in various ways.
body:
A mod that assists with party management, and requeueing on Hypixel in various ways.

Use the /requeue command to automatically requeue the game you are currently in.

Use /requeue help to view a variety of settings and options, most notably:\
/requeue auto - automatically do /requeue when your party is dead\
/requeue requeueonwin - automatically requeues when the game is over\
/requeue kickoffline - automatically kick offline players shortly after they disconnect
